statements.label: Highest agreement
statements.text: There should be a "community economy" the way there is a creator economy, that is recognized and resourced

statements.label: Most divided
statements.text: I spend more time on logistics (marketing, outreach, finding venues, making materials, follow-up) than on the actual community work I care about.

statements.label: Most engaged
statements.text: I've thought seriously about stopping my community work in the past year because of burnout
